title: 🎮 Service Control & Actions
description: Interactive dashboard — Docker container start/stop, traffic generation. Calls the Docker Engine API (localhost:2375 CORS proxy) and Spring Boot API (localhost:8080) directly from the browser.

panels.title: Container Start / Stop
panels.description: Live container state from Docker Engine API (polling every 5 s). Start/Stop buttons call POST /containers/{name}/{start|stop}. 'Stop Non-Essential' stops everything except DB, Redis, Kafka, LGTM in one click.

options.content: Connecting to Docker API…

panels.title: HTTP Traffic Generator
panels.description: Sends POST /customers requests to generate HTTP traffic visible in the throughput and latency charts. Configurable count and delay. Useful for triggering Resilience4j circuit breakers or testing rate limits.

options.content: Ready.

panels.title: Live Throughput (during traffic)
panels.description: Watch the RPS rise as traffic is generated. Stacked bars: green=2xx, orange=4xx, red=5xx.
